compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and ADR references from plugin-dir INSTALL.md to root INSTALL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Implementation Steps
1. `CLAUDE.md` — update 2 references (MUST be committed before deletion of plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md):
   - Line ~57: `See plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md` → `See INSTALL.md`
   - Line ~173: `check plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md for shim installation steps` → `check INSTALL.md for shim installation steps`
2. `docs/adr/0007-stack-aware-architect-foundation.md` — update INSTALL.md path references in the restructure section to reflect that INSTALL.md now lives at repo root

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `grep -n 'plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL' CLAUDE.md` returns exit 1 (no stale references)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md still contains at least 2 occurrences of `INSTALL.md` (references exist, now root-relative)
  Verify: test $(grep -c 'INSTALL\.md' CLAUDE.md) -ge 2
- [ ] `grep -n 'plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL' docs/adr/0007-stack-aware-architect-foundation.md` returns exit 1
  Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL' docs/adr/0007-stack-aware-architect-foundation.md
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

comments.body: AC amendment: Also update plugins/dso/README.md line 22: change 'See `docs/INSTALL.md`' to 'See `INSTALL.md`' (or a root-relative reference). The relative path from plugins/dso/README.md resolves to plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md — after deletion this would be a broken reference that blocks check-referential-integrity.sh. Add acceptance criterion: ! grep -q 'docs/INSTALL\.md' plugins/dso/README.md
comments.author: Test
